landing-page.appdesc: All-in-one ERP platform that helps you automate processes, optimize human resources and control finances. Designed specifically for Vietnamese SMEs.

features.title: All the tools you need. In one place.
features.subtitle: DigiERP replaces dozens of fragmented software with a unified, powerful and secure platform.

hr.title: Human Resources Management
hr.desc: Automate attendance, payroll and 360-degree employee record management.

analytics.title: Finance & Accounting
analytics.desc: Real-time cash flow. Automatic accounting and electronic invoicing.

automation.title: Project Management
automation.desc: Assign tasks, track progress with Kanban/Gantt. Unlimited collaboration.

integration.title: Multi-channel CRM
integration.desc: Nurture leads. Integrate Call Center, Email and SMS Marketing.

security.title: ISO 27001 Security
security.desc: Bank-grade data encryption. Detailed field-level permissions.

scalable.title: Smart Warehouse
scalable.desc: Min/max inventory alerts. Manage batches, expiry dates, barcode/QR.

bigFeature.title: Smart reporting. Accurate decisions.
bigFeature.desc: Don't let data die on paper. DigiERP's dashboard transforms raw data into visual charts, helping you understand your business health in just 3 seconds.

cta.title: Ready to go digital?
cta.desc: Join 2,000+ businesses growing rapidly with DigiERP. Sign up for a 14-day free trial, no credit card required.
cta.disclaimer: No credit card required • Cancel anytime

footer.description: Comprehensive management solution for Vietnamese SMEs.
